title: Claude + NotebookLM: Ultimate AI Automation Workflow to Work 10x Faster
summary: Video demonstrates three no-code AI workflows combining Claude with NotebookLM following Google's June 2026 Gemini 3.5 Flash update and Anthropic's Claude Cowork release. Workflows include automated content generation from sources, AI-engineered infographic creation from PDFs, and scheduled podcast delivery via browser automation.
writeup: The video walks through three no-code workflows that pair Claude with NotebookLM, positioned after Google's June 2026 Gemini 3.5 Flash update and Anthropic's Claude Cowork release. The three workflows are automated content generation from source material, AI-engineered infographic creation from PDFs, and scheduled podcast delivery handled through browser automation. The throughline is combining prompt engineering, scheduling, and browser automation to chain the two tools into repeatable pipelines.
